## What this PR changes

A one-sentence description.

## Type of change

- [ ] New example campaign added to `references/examples.md`
- [ ] Correction to an existing example (attribution, year, headline wording)
- [ ] New technique section added to `references/examples.md`
- [ ] Addition to `references/frameworks.md`
- [ ] Addition to `references/craft.md`
- [ ] Skill workflow change in `SKILL.md`
- [ ] Update to `references/self-edit.md`
- [ ] Translation of skill files into another language
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## House style check

- [ ] No em dashes, en dashes, or standalone hyphens introduced. No compound-word hyphens like "go-to-market" (use "GTM" or "go to market").
- [ ] No banned AI words from `references/self-edit.md` introduced.
- [ ] Examples include brand, year (approximate is fine), agency, and headline where the line is famous enough to quote.
- [ ] Award attributions (Cannes Lions, Clio, D&AD, One Show) included where verifiable.
- [ ] Read aloud. Sounds like a sharp human, not an LLM.

## Source / attribution

If adding an example or making a factual claim, paste the source URL or citation.
